# `GetBit`

**Systems:** MOS6502, M6809  
**Parameters:** `a,b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>[byte] = GetBit( [address], [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - to check</li>
    <li>[byte] - bit to check</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Returns the bit specified in parameter 2 at the address in parameter 1 (0 or 1).</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
// Check if sprite "i" is on
is_active := GetBit( SPRITE_BITMASK, i );
<br>
//  sprite-sprite collision occurred
if ( GetBit( ^$D019, 2 ) = 1) then begin
   ....
</code>


</div>
